Package org.cibseven.bpm.identity.impl.ldap

Class CachingLdapIdentityProviderSession

java.lang.Object
org.cibseven.bpm.identity.impl.ldap.LdapIdentityProviderSession
org.cibseven.bpm.identity.impl.ldap.CachingLdapIdentityProviderSession
All Implemented Interfaces:
ReadOnlyIdentityProvider, Session
public class CachingLdapIdentityProviderSession extends LdapIdentityProviderSession
The cache key includes the pagination window (firstResult, maxResults) and the ordering, because those determine which slice of results is returned. Without them, page 2 of a query would hit the cached page 1 and return the wrong rows.

Note: caching paginated slices of an externally-mutable, ordered collection can still skew across pages if entries are added/removed/reordered in LDAP between two page fetches (the pages were cached at different times). This window is bounded by the TTL; keep it short if exact cross-page consistency matters. Passwords are intentionally not cached; checkPassword(java.lang.String, java.lang.String) always hits LDAP.
